name: engineering-delivery
title: Product Delivery & Engineering Console
subtitle: backlog, velocity, teams & releases — from queue to launch
description: A delivery showcase spanning eight distinct visual forms not used elsewhere in the gallery: a scrollable backlog table, a dual-axis bar+line velocity trend, side-by-side team comparison bars, a stacked ticket-type mix, a planned-vs-actual dumbbell, a cycle-time histogram, an alternating release-milestone timeline, and a most-mentioned-tools word cloud.

dataAccesses.name: DeliveryKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(story_points) AS velocity_points, SUM(CASE WHEN ticket_status='Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS open_defect_count, ROUND(AVG(cycle_hours),0) AS cycle_time_hrs, ROUND(AVG(readiness_pct),1) AS readiness_pct FROM v_delivery_master

dataAccesses.name: BacklogQueue
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT item_id AS item_title, item_type, assignee AS owner, ticket_status AS status, hours_since_open AS hours_open FROM v_backlog_items ORDER BY hours_since_open DESC LIMIT 25

dataAccesses.name: SprintVelocity
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.year_month_name AS sprint_period, SUM(v.story_points) AS story_points_completed, SUM(CASE WHEN v.item_type='Defect' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS defects_opened FROM v_sprint_velocity v JOIN dim_date d ON v.date_key = d.date_key GROUP BY d.year_month_number, d.year_month_name ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: TeamVelocityBySprint
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.year_month_name AS sprint_period, SUM(CASE WHEN t.name='Team Alpha' THEN v.story_points END) AS team_alpha_points, SUM(CASE WHEN t.name='Team Beta' THEN v.story_points END) AS team_beta_points, SUM(CASE WHEN t.name='Team Gamma' THEN v.story_points END) AS team_gamma_points FROM v_sprint_velocity v JOIN dim_team t ON v.team_id = t.id JOIN dim_date d ON v.date_key = d.date_key GROUP BY d.year_month_number, d.year_month_name ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: TicketMixByTeam
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT t.name AS team_name, SUM(CASE WHEN i.item_type='Bug' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bug_count, SUM(CASE WHEN i.item_type='Feature' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS feature_count, SUM(CASE WHEN i.item_type='Chore' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS chore_count FROM v_backlog_items i JOIN dim_team t ON i.team_id = t.id GROUP BY t.name

dataAccesses.name: PlannedVsActualPoints
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT t.name AS team_name, SUM(v.planned_points) AS planned_points, SUM(v.story_points) AS actual_points FROM v_sprint_velocity v JOIN dim_team t ON v.team_id = t.id GROUP BY t.name

dataAccesses.name: CycleTimeRaw
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT item_id AS ticket_ref, cycle_hours AS cycle_time_hrs FROM v_backlog_items WHERE ticket_status = 'Closed'

dataAccesses.name: ReleaseMilestones
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT r.release_name AS milestone_name, d.year_month_name AS milestone_period FROM v_release_milestones r JOIN dim_date d ON r.date_key = d.date_key ORDER BY d.year_month_number

dataAccesses.name: TicketToolMentions
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT tool_name AS tool_mentioned, COUNT(*) AS mention_count FROM v_ticket_tool_mentions GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

kpis.label: Sprint Velocity
kpis.info: Story points completed in the current sprint.

kpis.label: Avg Cycle Time (hrs)
kpis.info: Average hours from ticket open to close.

panels.title: Open Backlog Queue
panels.info: The longest-open backlog items across every team, newest tickets not shown.

panels.title: Sprint Velocity vs. Defects Opened
panels.info: Story points completed each sprint against the defects opened in the same window.

panels.title: Story Points by Team
panels.info: Side-by-side comparison of each team's completed story points across sprints.

panels.title: Ticket Mix by Team
panels.info: Bug, feature, and chore ticket counts stacked per team.

panels.title: Planned vs. Actual Points by Team
panels.info: The gap between planned and delivered story points for each team.

panels.title: Cycle Time Distribution
panels.info: How long closed tickets took from open to close, grouped into buckets.

panels.title: Release Milestones
panels.info: Upcoming and past release milestones on a single timeline.

panels.title: Most-Mentioned Tools in Tickets
panels.info: Which tools and platforms come up most often in ticket text.
